what: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Application Shiny/golem pour la plateforme d’analyse systemique forestiere Nemeton. nemetonshiny fournit l’interface utilisateur interactive. La logique metier (indicateurs, calculs, referentiels) est portee par le package nemeton (>= 0.15.1).

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Carte interactive – selection de parcelles cadastrales via Leaflet et l’API cadastre IGN Gestion de projets – creation, sauvegarde et restauration de diagnostics forestiers 29 indicateurs Nemeton – calcul automatique sur les parcelles selectionnees 12 familles d’indicateurs – visualisation radar, scores et detail par famille Synthese LLM – analyse contextuelle par 16 profils d’experts (ellmer / Mistral) Export PDF & GeoPackage – rapports Quarto et donnees geospatiales Internationalisation – francais et anglais (293 cles de traduction) Accessibilite – conformite WCAG 2.1 AA

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: R >= 4.1.0 nemeton >= 0.15.1 (package core) Librairies systeme : GDAL, GEOS, PROJ, libudunits2

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: shiny, bslib, leaflet, sf, terra, DT, promises, ellmer, httr2, yaml, jsonlite. Voir le fichier DESCRIPTION pour la liste complete.

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
code: # Installer le package core nemeton remotes::install_github("pobsteta/nemeton")  # Installer nemetonshiny remotes::install_github("pobsteta/nemetonshiny")

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Options disponibles :

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Le docker-compose.yml demarre : - Keycloak (port 8080) – authentification OAuth2/OIDC - nemetonshiny (port 3838) – application Shiny Variables d’environnement configurables dans docker-compose.yml : - NEMETON_LANG – langue (defaut : fr) - NEMETON_PAYS – pays (defaut : FR) - MISTRAL_API_KEY – cle API Mistral pour la synthese LLM

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: Le projet suit l’architecture golem :
code: R/   app_ui.R / app_server.R   -- UI et serveur principaux   mod_*.R                    -- modules Shiny (auth, home, map, project,                                 family, synthesis, search, progress)   service_*.R                -- services (cadastre, communes, compute,                                 db, export, project)   llm_prompts.R              -- gestion des prompts LLM   utils_i18n.R               -- internationalisation   utils_theme.R              -- theme et styles  inst/   experts/                   -- 16 profils d'experts LLM (YAML)   quarto/                    -- template de rapport PDF   sql/                       -- schema et migrations

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: 20 fichiers de tests couvrant l’ensemble des modules et services.

title: nemetonshiny - Application Shiny pour l'analyse systemique forestiere
text: EUPL v1.2 Les donnees sont soumises des conditions specifiques decrites dans LICENSE-DATA.md.

title: nemetonApp Configuration — app_config
text: Configuration constants settings nemetonApp Shiny application.

title: Management Group Profiles Configuration — config_groupes
text: Loads exposes configurable profiles used classify UGF (Unités de Gestion Forestière). profile selected project determines:   - dropdown label (e.g. "Groupe d'aménagement" ONF,     "Groupe de gestion" CRPF, "Zone" OFB/ENS)   - list allowed codes + human-readable labels   - color palette used map   - codes considered "hors production" (excluded     production-oriented indicators) Profiles defined `inst/config/groupes_amenagement.yaml` can overridden user-level file `~/.local/share/nemeton/groupes_amenagement.yaml` (via `nemeton.groupes_config` option).

title: Initialize database schema — db_init_schema
text: Creates nemeton schema, tables, indexes exist. Reads inst/sql/schema.sql.

title: Initialize database schema — db_init_schema
text: con DBI connection object. NULL, creates new connection.

title: Initialize database schema — db_init_schema
text: Logical. TRUE successful.

what: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
title: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
text: Uploads local project (parquet files) PostGIS database.

title: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
text: project_id Character. Local project ID. con DBI connection. NULL, creates new one.

title: Sync local project to database — db_sync_project
text: Logical. TRUE successful.

what: Domain Layer: Unités de Gestion (UG) — domain_ug
title: Domain Layer: Unités de Gestion (UG) — domain_ug
text: Pure domain logic Management Units (UG). Contains constructors, commands, queries, invariant validation. Shiny dependency. Domain concepts: - Parcelle cadastrale: immutable cadastral polygon - Tenement: smallest geometric subdivision (whole parcel fragment) - UG: grouping 1+ tenements = operational forestry unit - Groupe d'aménagement: functional classification UGs command returns new projet (functional immutability). 5 invariants enforced every command.

what: Download functions for external data sources — download_functions
title: Download functions for external data sources — download_functions
text: Functions download raster vector data various French geographic data providers (IGN, INPN, Copernicus).

what: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
text: Generates PDF report, using Quarto available falling back simple PDF generation.

title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
code: generate_report_pdf(   project,   family_scores,   output_file,   language = "fr",   synthesis_comments = NULL,   family_comments = NULL,   cover_image = NULL,   use_quarto = TRUE )

title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
text: project List. Project object. family_scores sf. Family scores. output_file Character. Path output PDF. language Character. Language code. synthesis_comments Character. Optional synthesis comments (supports markdown). family_comments Named list. Optional comments per family (keyed family code, supports markdown). cover_image Character. Optional path cover image first page. use_quarto Logical. Whether try Quarto first. Default TRUE.

title: Generate PDF report (main entry point) — generate_report_pdf
text: Character. Path generated PDF.

title: LLM Prompts — llm_prompts
text: System user prompts LLM-based analysis nemeton.

what: Project Migration: v1 to v2 (UG support) — migrate
title: Project Migration: v1 to v2 (UG support) — migrate
text: Migrates projects schema v1 (parcel-) v2 (UG support). Creates default tenements UGs 1 parcel = 1 tenement = 1 UG. Migration transparent: existing indicator values preserved exactly. UG layer additive — sits top unchanged parcel data.

title: Authentication Module using shinyOAuth — mod_auth
text: OAuth2/OIDC authentication module nemetonApp. Supports Keycloak, Google, GitHub, Microsoft, OIDC provider. Authentication optional: OAuth credentials configured, app runs without authentication (mode anonyme).

what: Field Ingest Module for nemetonApp — mod_field_ingest
title: Field Ingest Module for nemetonApp — mod_field_ingest
text: QField return path (E5.b). Takes GeoPackage produced QField field session, validates placette / arbre schemas, aggregates per-plot dendrometric metrics attaches project's forest units. Persisting field data bumps NDP level (0 -> 2 placettes , 0 -> 3 trees captured sufficient density) via nemeton::detect_ndp(). MVP persists validated field data new NDP level project, rerun compute_all_indicators. user triggers recompute Home tab afterwards; indicators consume field aggregates (P1, P2, B2, C1, R2) pick project layers.

title: Home Module for nemetonApp — mod_home
text: Main home/selection page module integrates: - Recent projects list - Commune search - Map parcel selection - Project creation form

title: Map Module for nemetonApp — mod_map
text: Shiny module displaying interactive Leaflet map cadastral parcels. Supports parcel selection/deselection click, basemap switching, enforces maximum selection limit.

title: Progress Module for nemetonApp — mod_progress
text: Shiny module displaying computation progress. Shows download computation status detailed progress.

title: Project Module for nemetonApp — mod_project
text: Shiny module project metadata form. Handles project name, description, owner, creation date.

title: Sampling Module for nemetonApp — mod_sampling
text: Field sampling plan module. Lets user generate sampling plots current project's study area download QField project (.qgz) -field data capture. .qgz produced nemeton::create_qfield_project() bundles placettes + empty arbres layers pre-configured forms. First iteration uses spatial random draw (sf::st_sample). full stratified GRTS pipeline lives 09-sampling tutorial lifted nemeton create_sampling_plan() follow-iteration.

title: Search Module for nemetonApp — mod_search
text: Shiny module searching selecting French communes. Provides department filtering commune selection.

title: UG (Management Units) Module — mod_ug
text: Shiny module managing Unites de Gestion (UG). Boucle 1: table + leaflet map tenement selection, merge/split/rename, groupe d'amenagement assignment, color-coded map display.

title: NDP Shiny Widgets — ndp_widgets
text: Shiny-specific NDP widgets (badge, progress bar). UI components belong nemetonshiny, nemeton core package. NDP functions (NDP_LEVELS, detect_ndp, compute_general_index, get_ndp_level, set/restore_ndp_attributes, etc.) live nemeton core package. Exported ones called via nemeton::, internal helpers imported R/imports.R via utils::getFromNamespace().

what: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: Launches interactive nemetonApp parcel selection forest indicator analysis. application allows users : Search select cadastral parcels interactive map Create projects metadata Calculate 29 nemeton indicators automatically Analyze results indicator family (12 tabs) Export PDF reports GeoPackage data

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: language Character. Interface language: "fr" (French, default) "en" (English). NULL, system language auto-detected. project_dir Character. Directory storing projects. Default: ~/.nemeton/projects max_parcels Integer. Maximum number parcels can selected simultaneously map. Default: 30. Must positive integer. ... Additional arguments passed shinyApp.

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: Shiny application object (invisibly).

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: application requires internet connection : Cadastral parcel data (API Cadastre / happign fallback External data layers (INPN, IGN BD Forêt, Corine Land Cover) Projects saved locally GeoParquet format efficient caching.

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
text: application follows WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines: Color contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 Keyboard navigation support Colorblind-friendly viridis palettes Touch targets >= 44px

title: Launch the nemetonApp Shiny Application — run_app
code: if (interactive()) {   # Launch with default settings (French)   run_app()    # Launch in English   run_app(language = "en")    # Custom project directory   run_app(project_dir = "~/my_nemeton_projects")    # Raise the selectable parcels limit to 50   run_app(max_parcels = 50) }

title: Cadastre Service for nemetonApp — service_cadastre
text: Service retrieving cadastral parcel data French cadastre. Uses API Cadastre (data.gouv.fr) primary source happign fallback.

title: Communes Service for nemetonApp — service_communes
text: Service searching retrieving French commune (municipality) data. Provides autocomplete functionality geometry retrieval.

title: Compute Service for nemetonApp — service_compute
text: Service managing asynchronous indicator calculations. Handles data downloading, caching, computation orchestration.

title: Database Service for PostgreSQL/PostGIS — service_db
text: Connection operations PostgreSQL/PostGIS database (ADR-002). database stores projects, parcels, indicators, users multi-user access spatial queries. Connection optional: database credentials configured, app falls back local parquet storage.

title: Export Services — service_export
text: Functions exporting nemeton project data generating reports.

title: Project Service for nemetonApp — service_project
text: Service managing nemeton projects - creation, saving, loading. Projects stored GeoParquet format efficient spatial data handling.

title: Tenement Splitting Functions — tenement_split
text: Functions splitting cadastral parcels sub-tenements via imported geometries (GeoJSON/Shapefile). Maintains cadastral tiling invariant. Boucle 2: Import-based splitting . Interactive splitting (leaflet draw) planned boucle 3.

title: Internationalization (i18n) for nemetonApp — utils_i18n
text: Translation system nemetonApp Shiny application. Supports French (fr) English (en).

title: nemetonApp Theme Configuration — utils_theme
text: Theme accessibility configuration nemetonApp Shiny application. Implements WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility guidelines.

what: New feature — Field ingest (E5.b — QField return path)
title: nemetonshiny (development version)
text: R/mod_field_ingest.R — new “Ingestion terrain” tab closes terrain → plateforme loop. field agent drops GeoPackage returned QField; module runs nemeton::import_qfield_gpkg() + validate_field_data(), renders validation report (counts, errors, warnings), previews placettes / arbres project map. NDP bump attach: clicking Rattacher au projet calls aggregate_plot_metrics() + attach_field_data_to_units() project’s UGF sf, tags via tag_field_data_sources(), runs detect_ndp() along alternative field path (NDP 2 plots , NDP 3 10 trees/plot average), persists GPKG <project>/data/field_data.gpkg updates project metadata bumped NDP picked every downstream module (synthesis badge, family tabs). /NDP badges make change visible user. MVP scope: iteration persists field data bumps NDP, rerun compute_all_indicators(). indicators consuming field aggregates (P1, P2, B2, C1, R2) picked next compute triggered Home tab. i18n: 22 new FR/EN keys (tab_field_ingest, field_ingest_*, field_ingest_ndp_before / _after, report headers). Tests: tests/testthat/test-mod_field_ingest.R — 24 assertions covering UI controls, reactive NULL state, validate flow real-ish GPKG (placettes + arbres) attach flow mocked persistence (GPKG written project dir + metadata update recorded).

what: Sampling module now uses the library-level GRTS pipeline
title: nemetonshiny (development version)
text: R/mod_sampling.R — replace temporary sf::st_sample(..., type = "random") draw nemeton::create_sampling_plan(), delivers GRTS stratification CHM/DEM/BD Forêt layers provided falls back spatially-balanced LPM2 plain random otherwise. notification now appends draw method (GRTS, LPM2, RANDOM) users can see path taken. i18n: sampling_method_note rewritten describe new behaviour.

what: New feature — Field sampling / QField export (E5.a)
title: nemetonshiny (development version)
text: R/mod_sampling.R — new “Terrain” tab: given current project’s study area (union indicators_sf polygons), user sets n_base / n_over / seed / biogeographic region, clicks Générer, previews sample plots leaflet map. Télécharger le projet QField (.qgz) button produces QField-ready project via nemeton::create_qfield_project() (placettes + empty arbres layer + pre-configured forms). First iteration uses spatial random draw (sf::st_sample). full stratified GRTS + TSP pipeline 09-sampling tutorial lifted nemeton::create_sampling_plan() follow-. DESCRIPTION now requires nemeton (>= 0.18.0.9000) create_qfield_project(). i18n: 14 new FR/EN keys (tab_sampling, sampling_*, qfield_*). Tests: tests/testthat/test-mod_sampling.R — 23 assertions covering UI controls, reactive draw, empty-state handling round-trip .qgz built module’s generated plots.

title: nemetonshiny (development version)
text: F1 now uses absolute SoilGrids CEC scoring path core package. compute_single_indicator() passes source = "soilgrids" indicateur_f1_fertilite(), streams 250 m CEC topsoil raster demand via nemeton::load_raster_source() applies nemeton::cec_to_fertility_score() (absolute 0-100). Scores now comparable across projects instead min-maxed per AOI. Removed duplicated download_soilgrids_cec() entry DATA_SOURCES$rasters$soil. core package owns download path (ADR-009), app longer stages SoilGrids layer layers$rasters$soil. One less pre-compute step surfaces progress UI. Bumped nemeton dependency >= 0.17.0.9000 (dev version introducing load_raster_source(), source = "soilgrids", UTS → fertility crosswalk).

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: First release targeting v0.17.0 nemeton core. End--end integration Open-Canopy CHM pipeline, live per-step progress feedback, consolidated i18n layer.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: ⚡ Hauteur ML — CHM consumed height-aware indicators (C1, B2, R2, P2). 📋 Inventaire estimé ML — P1 / P3 / E1 ran, meaning dbh / density synthesised CHM via nemeton::ensure_inventory_fields() (Charru 2012 self-thinning). BD Forêt enrichment P2 — UGFs enriched species / age BD Forêt V2 -front via nemeton::enrich_parcels_bdforet() indicateur_p2_station scheduled, CHM mode can run instead falling back legacy fertility / climate path never inputs.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: “Étape 1/5 : chargement de l’AOI…” “Étape 2/5 : téléchargement ortho IGN…” + “Téléchargement ortho IGN RVB : tuile 5/28…” per WMS tile “Étape 3/5 : configuration Python + téléchargement modèle…” “Étape 4/5 : inférence du modèle pvtv2…” + “Inférence CHM : tuile 2/3…” per inference tile “Étape 5/5 : export des résultats…” Initialisation spinner — toast paints ⚙ + “Initialisation des calculs…” moment user clicks “Lancer les calculs” “Réessayer”, 1-3 s gap async worker writes first progress event longer silent. Task translator unified — mod_progress.R longer ships partial translate_task(); delegates canonical translate_task_message() utils_i18n.R, every new task prefix routed label one place.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: Single source truth — TRANSLATIONS list R/utils_i18n.R now runtime dictionary. stale inst/app/i18n/{fr,en}.json files (339 keys, 19 behind R list) removed unused shiny.i18n suggested dependency dropped. export_translations_json() remains available one-way R → JSON exports external translators.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: download_chm_opencanopy() — unwraps bare SpatRaster / sf returned download_{raster,vector}_source() instead chasing $object attribute didn’t exist. previous code called [[ SpatRaster looking layer named “object” triggered terra [subset] invalid name(s) error aborted whole CHM pipeline forced P2 back legacy mode. Open-Canopy pipeline resume — retry recompute paths now reset project “draft” wait user re- launch run, instead silently firing new compute_task invocation. One entry point confirmation modal. Resume legacy progress file — translate_task_message() now maps pre-e74bdcc literal "download:source_chm_opencanopy" new "chm_inference_opencanopy" label re-opening older project longer spams “Translation key found: source_chm_opencanopy”. Tests — NEMETONSHINY_DISABLE_CHM=1 now scoped test run via withr::local_envvar(.local_envir =   testthat::teardown_env()) dedicated setup-chm.R, devtools::test() interactive session longer leaves CHM pipeline silently disabled.

title: nemetonshiny 0.16.0
text: None. CHM toggle previously visible compute button disappeared, underlying metadata still written (now reflecting outcome auto-detected run, user’s priori choice), synthesis badge keeps working old projects.

title: nemetonshiny 0.15.1
text: See git history.
